basicInfo.name: Smart RC Robot Companion RoboBuddy
basicInfo.nameZh: 智能伙伴机器人罗伯蒂

features: Touch sensors on head and hands

sellingPoints: Safe rounded design for younger kids

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Meet RoboBuddy – your child's new best friend! This smart interactive robot responds to voice commands, touch, and can even be programmed with custom dance moves. It's not just a toy; it's a companion that learns and grows with your child.
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 认识一下罗伯蒂——你孩子的新好朋友！这款智能交互式机器人可以响应语音命令、触摸，甚至可以用自定义舞蹈动作进行编程。它不只是一个玩具；它是陪伴孩子学习和成长的伙伴。

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Your Child's New Best Friend – Smart Robot RoboBuddy
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 你孩子的新好朋友——智能机器人罗伯蒂
marketingCopy.bodyEn: RoboBuddy represents the future of interactive playtime. With advanced voice recognition, touch sensitivity, and programmable intelligence, it creates a personalized experience for every child. From telling stories and singing songs to executing custom-programmed dance routines, RoboBuddy engages, educates, and entertains in ways traditional toys simply cannot match.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: 罗伯蒂代表了互动游戏时间的未来。先进的语音识别、触摸敏感性和可编程智能为每个孩子创造个性化体验。从讲故事、唱歌到执行自定义编程的舞蹈例程，罗伯蒂以传统玩具无法比拟的方式吸引、教育和娱乐孩子。
